subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-21 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In former times, the Persians held grand celebrations on such a day as this… Most of the people are unaware of this Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: در چنین روزی در ازمنهٴ سابقه ایرانیان جشن عظیم داشتند ولی این زمان پریشانند
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
